title: Is Digital Realty (DLR) One of the Best Data Center Stocks to Buy in July?
summary: Digital Realty (DLR) is highlighted as a top data center stock, with 73% of analysts rating it a "Buy" and an average price target indicating a 25.79% upside. Barclays recently raised its price target for DLR due to increased hyperscale and AI demand. The company also set a price for a public offering of common stock related to Blackstone's acquisition of joint venture interests.
title_zh: Digital Realty (DLR) 成七月数据中心首选？
summary_zh: Digital Realty (DLR) 被列为顶级数据中心股，73% 分析师给予“买入”评级，平均目标价暗示 25.79% 上行空间。Barclays 因超大规模及 AI 需求上调 DLR 目标价。公司还就 Blackstone 收购合资权益相关普通股公开发行定价。

title: Apollo's Sløk: The market faces big risks if hyperscalers' AI profits get delayed
summary: Apollo Global Management's chief economist Torsten Sløk warns of significant market risks if the projected free cash flow boom from hyperscalers' AI investments, expected to start in 2028, does not materialize. These companies have significantly increased debt to fund AI spending, shifting from "source of cash" to "user of cash." Delays in AI profits could lead to margin squeezes, a "Magnificent Seven" sell-off impacting the broader S&P 500, potential rating downgrades for tech giants, and even a possible recession.
rationale: affected_layers=accelerator, basket, foundry_equipment_eda, hyperscaler, memory_storage, server_infra
title_zh: Apollo首席经济学家警告：超大规模企业AI利润若延迟，市场面临重大风险
summary_zh: Apollo Global Management首席经济学家Torsten Sløk警告，若超大规模企业（hyperscalers）预期的AI投资自由现金流激增（预计2028年开始）未能实现，市场将面临重大风险。这些企业为资助AI支出大幅增加债务，已从“现金来源”转为“现金使用者”。AI利润延迟可能导致利润率压缩、“Magnificent Seven”抛售进而拖累标普500指数、科技巨头评级下调，甚至可能引发经济衰退。

title: Seagate and Western Digital Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of Seagate (STX) and Western Digital (WDC) skyrocketed after semiconductor stocks rebounded, driven by reports that China might ease restrictions on Nvidia AI chip imports. This rebound follows a recent selloff and profit-taking in the semiconductor sector. Western Digital, despite being up 214% this year, has experienced high volatility, with its latest jump indicating market confidence but not a fundamental shift in perception, especially given recent negative news like Samsung's record profits leading to a "sell-the-news" reaction and DeepSeek's AI inference chip development.

title: Chinese companies are ditching Nvidia’s advanced accelerators for domestic AI suppliers
summary: Chinese companies are increasingly moving away from Nvidia's advanced AI accelerators in favor of domestic suppliers, driven by US-China tensions and Beijing's goal of technological self-reliance. A Bloomberg Intelligence survey indicates executives plan to allocate 46% of their AI accelerator budget to domestic products in the next year. This shift is set to benefit Chinese firms like Huawei, Hygon, Tencent, and Alibaba, despite potential bottlenecks from a global memory chip shortage.
rationale: 地缘政治导致中国客户减少采购NVDA高端芯片，直接冲击其营收和市场份额，是典型的出口管制类鬼故事

direction_reasons.NVDA: 中国客户转向国产芯片，削弱NVDA在AI加速器市场的需求预期

title_zh: 中国企业加速弃用英伟达高端AI芯片，转向本土供应商
summary_zh: 受中美紧张局势及北京技术自主目标推动，中国企业正加速从英伟达（NVDA）高端AI加速器转向本土供应商。彭博行业研究调查显示，高管计划未来一年将46%的AI加速器预算分配给国产产品。此举利好华为、海光信息（Hygon）、腾讯（Tencent）及阿里巴巴（Alibaba）等本土厂商，但全球存储芯片短缺可能形成瓶颈。

title: Cantor Fitzgerald reiterates Analog Devices stock rating at overweight By Investing.com
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has reiterated an "Overweight" rating for Analog Devices (NASDAQ: ADI), setting a new price target of $550, aligning with the highest analyst target. The firm believes Analog Devices has significant upside potential due to an under-appreciated power opportunity and strong leverage to AI spending, particularly following its acquisition of Empower Semiconductor. This rating reinforces previous positive outlooks and reflects confidence in the company's performance and strategic acquisitions within the AI power semiconductor sector.

title: Alphabet slides premarket as Google AI costs meet cloud headwinds
summary: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) shares slid premarket due to concerns over high AI spending and cloud headwinds, with the company projecting significant capital expenditures for 2026. Investors are scrutinizing whether Google's AI investments will yield sufficient returns to justify the costs, especially as its valuation no longer presents a significant discount compared to peers like Amazon and NVIDIA. Despite analyst backing and its recent inclusion in the Dow, the market is weighing funding pressure against the potential for AI returns, with some analysts suggesting a rotation into AI hyperscalers but noting a lack of clear evidence of strong AI product returns.

title: Apple tests CXMT memory chips for China devices as DRAM maker gains clout: FT
summary: Apple is reportedly testing memory chips from Chinese state-backed ChangXin Memory Technologies (CXMT) for devices sold in China and is advocating for broader use of CXMT's products in Washington. This move highlights CXMT's ascent as the world's fourth-largest DRAM producer, with plans for an IPO to expand capacity and develop advanced memory technologies. The increasing influence of Chinese chipmakers raises concerns among rivals about potential price pressure on global memory markets due to state-backed investment.
rationale: CXMT作为中国DRAM新势力，产能扩张和IPO计划可能引发全球DRAM供给过剩，对现有厂商形成价格压力，属于产能泛滥型鬼故事

summary_zh: 据FT报道，苹果（AAPL）正测试中国国有背景的长鑫存储（CXMT）内存芯片，用于在华销售设备，并推动华盛顿方面扩大对CXMT产品的使用。此举凸显CXMT作为全球第四大DRAM生产商的崛起，其计划通过IPO扩产并开发先进存储技术。中国芯片制造商影响力增强，引发竞争对手担忧国家支持的投资可能对全球内存市场造成价格压力。

title: Georgia utility regulators greenlight probe into data center costs
summary: The Georgia Public Service Commission has approved an investigation into whether industrial customers, such as data centers that are heavy energy consumers, are shifting costs to residential customers of Georgia Power. This probe resulted from an agreement between the utility and PSC staff, prompted by concerns that data center energy demands could increase residential costs by up to 11% monthly by 2028. The investigation aims to bring transparency to energy cost allocation, although a proposal for a deeper analysis was voted down by the commission's Republican majority, the agreed-upon investigation is expected to conclude by year-end.

title: Memory shortage crisis: Apple CEO confirms higher prices are on the way; chip stocks keep soaring
summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook has confirmed that the company will raise prices on its devices due to an unavoidable AI-fueled memory chip shortage. The crisis, driven by high demand for RAM and storage chips for AI servers from hyperscalers like Nvidia and Google, has led to skyrocketing prices and a shift in manufacturing towards more expensive AI-specific chips, impacting consumer device costs. This means consumers might pay more for new Apple products, such as the next iPhone, set to ship in September.

title_zh: 边缘 AI 芯片制造商 Ambiq Micro 计划通过 IPO 筹集至多 8500 万美元

title: Mega Fortune Company Limited Closes $15 Million IPO
summary: Mega Fortune Company Limited successfully closed its initial public offering on July 17, 2025, raising $15 million by selling 3,750,000 ordinary shares at $4.00 each. The shares are now listed on The Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol 'MGRT'. This IPO is a significant step for the Hong Kong-based IoT solutions provider, aiming to boost its market presence and expand its services in the Asia-Pacific region.
title_zh: Mega Fortune Company Limited 完成 1500 万美元的首次公开募股

title: TSMC profit surges 61% to record high fueled by AI chip demand
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) reported a record 61% year-on-year surge in second-quarter profit, beating estimates, primarily driven by strong demand for AI chips. The company forecast a significant revenue increase for the third quarter and projected full-year 2025 revenue to rise by about 30% in U.S. dollar terms. title_zh: AI芯片需求推动台积电利润飙升61%创历史新高

title: Nvidia Boss Expects to Get First H20 China Export Licenses Soon
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang expects to receive the first US licenses for exporting H20 AI chips to China soon, allowing the company to resume sales of these crucial components. Huang stated that US officials have assured Nvidia of rapid approval, emphasizing the company's eagerness to fulfill existing orders for the H20 chips. This development marks a significant step for Nvidia in navigating US export controls to its key semiconductor market in China.
title_zh: 英伟达老板预计很快将获得首张H20中国出口许可证
summary_zh: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋预计很快将获得美国第一批向中国出口 H20 人工智能芯片的许可证，从而使该公司能够恢复这些关键零部件的销售。黄仁勋表示，美国官员已向英伟达保证会迅速获得批准，并强调该公司渴望履行 H20 芯片的现有订单。这一进展标志着英伟达在应对美国对中国主要半导体市场的出口管制方面迈出了重要一步。

summary: Robot Consulting Co., Ltd. has announced the pricing of its initial public offering of 3,750,000 American Depositary Shares (ADSs) at US$4 per ADS, aiming to raise $15 million. The ADSs are expected to trade on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol “LAWR” starting July 17, 2025. title_zh: 机器人咨询有限公司宣布首次公开募股定价1500万美元
summary_zh: Robot Consulting Co., Ltd.宣布首次公开发行3,750,000股美国存托股票（ADS），定价为每股ADS 4美元，目标融资1500万美元。美国存托凭证预计将于 2025 年 7 月 17 日在纳斯达克资本市场进行交易，股票代码为“LAWR”。此次发行的收益将用于资助这家专门从事人力资源解决方案、法律技术、技术和服务的日本平台服务提供商的人才招聘、研发、设备、办公室扩建和一般企业用途。

title: New Semiconductor SPAC Launches $100M IPO: Silver Pegasus Targets Tech Acquisitions
summary: Silver Pegasus Acquisition Corp. has priced its initial public offering of 10,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit, aiming to raise $100 million. The company, a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC), will trade on Nasdaq under the ticker "SPEGU" and plans to focus its acquisition search on businesses within the semiconductor industry. The offering is expected to close on July 16, 2025, with Roth Capital Partners acting as the sole underwriter.
title_zh: 新半导体 SPAC 启动 1 亿美元 IPO：Silver Pegasus 瞄准科技收购
summary_zh: Silver Pegasus Acquisition Corp. 已将其 10,000,000 单位的首次公开募股定价为每单位 10.00 美元，旨在筹集 1 亿美元。该公司是一家特殊目的收购公司（SPAC），将在纳斯达克上市，股票代码为“SPEGU”，并计划将收购重点放在半导体行业内的业务上。此次发行预计将于 2025 年 7 月 16 日结束，Roth Capital Partners 担任独家承销商。

The piece also provides best practices for utilizing tCPA effectively and outlines scenarios where it might not be the most suitable strategy.

title_zh: 彻底改变营销活动效率：新的目标每次转化费用如何提供更智能、可扩展的结果
summary_zh: 本文详细介绍了新增强的目标每次转化费用 (tCPA) 出价策略，强调其通过将自动化与实时优化相结合来提供更智能、可扩展的结果的能力。它解释了广告商如何在不超支的情况下实现预算灵活性、体验免提优化以及扩大支出以获得持续结果。该文章还提供了有效利用 tCPA 的最佳实践，并概述了它可能不是最合适策略的场景。
